landing.title: You’ve been invited to Gracewell Together
landing.subtitle: Shared prayer, reflection, and spiritual growth for two.
landing.code_helper: Already installed? Open Gracewell and use this code in Together.
landing.footer: You’ll be able to share prayers, begin sessions together, and follow shared paths.

invalid.title: This invitation link looks incomplete
invalid.subtitle: You can still download Gracewell and ask the sender to share the invitation again.
invalid.helper: If you already have Gracewell, you can still try opening the app and checking Together.

accept.title: Join Gracewell Together
accept.subtitle: %@ invited you to begin shared prayer and reflection.
accept.footer: You can choose what you share inside the app.
accept.error: We couldn’t accept this invitation right now.
accept.error_invalid: This invitation is no longer valid.

clipboard.title: Use your invitation?
clipboard.message: We found a Gracewell Together invitation in your clipboard.
clipboard.error: We couldn’t use the copied invitation.

code_entry.title: Enter Invite Code
code_entry.subtitle: Paste or type the code you received.
code_entry.error_empty: Enter an invite code to continue.
code_entry.error_invalid: That invite code doesn’t look valid.

sender.sent_subtitle: We’ll be ready when your partner joins.
